autor: I'm not meant to be judged on how good a housekeeper I am. Getting down on the floor with a lemon and a bucket of vinegar does not make me a better person.
explicacao: Citação de I'm not meant to be judged on how good a housekeeper I am. Getting down on the floor with a lemon and a bucket of vinegar does not make me a better person. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It's not the nineteenth century” articula reflexao, emily-matchar, nineteenth em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
